caption: A man with glasses and a grey, stylized wig sits in what appears to be a clothing store, given the mannequins, garment racks, and "LEE" signage in the background. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with suspenders and a small bow tie, wearing black over-ear headphones. He sits before a black professional microphone. To his right, a logo featuring the text "GLOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is visible on a red and white graphic. The wall behind him is decorated with numerous framed photographs. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth slightly open and shifting as he talks. His head remains relatively stationary, though there are slight changes in his facial expression and lip movement as he continues to address someone off-screen.
